question: What is the maximum airspeed (in km/h) of the third fastest bird?
dsl:
answer_1: str = qa_model("List the three fastest birds.")
answers_2, answers_3, answers_4 = map(str, shuffle([answer_1] + answers_1))
answer_5: float = qa_model("What is the speed of {answers_2}?", answers_2=answers_2)
answer_6: float = qa_model("What is the speed of {answers_3}?", answers_3=answers_3)
if answers_4 == answers_3:
    answer_7: float = qa_model("What is the speed of {answers_2}?", answers_2=answers_2)
else:
    answer_7: float = qa_model("What is the speed of {answers_4}?", answers_4=answers_4)
answer_8: float = max([answer_5, answer_6, answer_7])
answer_9: str = qa_model("What is the speed of the third fastest bird among [{answers_2}, {answers_3}, {answers_4}]?", answers_2=answers_2, answers_3=answers_3, answers_4=answers_4)
return f"The maximum airspeed (in km/h) of the third fastest bird is {answer_8}"
